title: Holdout Helpdesk Compliant
transcript: Agent: Thanks for calling the helpdesk. Before I reset or unlock your account, I need to verify your identity first. Once we have confirmed your details, I can issue a temporary password right away.

expected_labels.anchor: Before I reset or unlock your account, I need to verify your identity first.
expected_labels.label: Compliant

expected_labels.anchor: Before I confirm this booking change, there is a change fee that will apply.
expected_labels.label: Non-Compliant

expected_labels.anchor: There is also a fare difference on the new itinerary, so you will either pay the extra amount or receive the balance as travel credit.
expected_labels.label: Non-Compliant

title: Holdout Helpdesk Non-Compliant
transcript: Agent: I can unlock the account for you right now so you can get back in, and if anything else comes up we can confirm your details after that.

expected_labels.anchor: Before I reset or unlock your account, I need to verify your identity first.
expected_labels.label: Non-Compliant

expected_labels.anchor: Before I confirm this booking change, there is a change fee that will apply.
expected_labels.label: Non-Compliant

expected_labels.anchor: There is also a fare difference on the new itinerary, so you will either pay the extra amount or receive the balance as travel credit.
expected_labels.label: Non-Compliant

title: Holdout Travel Fully Compliant
transcript: Agent: Before I confirm this booking change, there is a change fee that will apply. There is also a fare difference on the new itinerary, so you will need to pay the extra amount before I finalize the change.

expected_labels.anchor: Before I reset or unlock your account, I need to verify your identity first.
expected_labels.label: Non-Compliant

expected_labels.anchor: Before I confirm this booking change, there is a change fee that will apply.
expected_labels.label: Compliant

expected_labels.anchor: There is also a fare difference on the new itinerary, so you will either pay the extra amount or receive the balance as travel credit.
expected_labels.label: Compliant
